The '''TZ-15 shuttle''', otherwise known as the '''Consortium Shuttle''', was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was used to [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Defiler]]s and other key personnel across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They were also used to transport prisoners, such as planetary officials abducted in the criminal empire's operations. The hull of the shuttle was decorated in a similar way to [[Merciless (Aggressor-class)|''Merciless'']].

{{Ship-stub}}
